from cadquery import Workplane

# Create a torus-shaped ring for jewelry
# Outer diameter: 20mm (typical ring size)
# Inner diameter: 16mm (finger hole)
# Cross-section diameter: 2mm (band thickness)

# Calculate torus parameters
major_radius = 9  # Distance from center to middle of band (18mm outer diameter)
minor_radius = 1  # Half thickness of the band (2mm thick)

# Create the torus by revolving a circle around the Z-axis
result = (Workplane("XY")
    .circle(major_radius)  # Create path cir...
